scripts.check: node --check app.js frontend/api.js frontend/connection_config.js frontend/connection_link.js frontend/discovery.js frontend/lifecycle.js frontend/native_bridge.js frontend/offline.js frontend/onboarding.js frontend/qr_scanner.js frontend/realtime.js frontend/recent_connections.js frontend/state.js frontend/ui.js scripts/build_android.mjs scripts/generate_keystore.mjs scripts/prepare_mobile.mjs scripts/serve_web.mjs
scripts.android:add: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync android
